temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A group of cyclists in colorful racing gear rides in a tight peloton on a paved road. A man in a dark suit and light-colored pants walks alongside them, moving in the same direction as the cyclists. (Storyline: The video opens by establishing a surreal and dynamic scene, combining the speed of a cycling race with the unexpected presence of a man in a suit walking alongside the riders.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Upbeat, energetic rock music with a driving drum beat and electric guitar begins to play.)
(00:02-00:05) An aerial shot reveals the full peloton of cyclists riding in a line down a long, straight road. The road is surrounded by vast, rolling hills with plowed fields, creating a dramatic and scenic backdrop. (Storyline: This shot emphasizes the scale of the cycling event and the beautiful, rural setting, contrasting the high-speed action with the serene environment.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The energetic rock music continues, with lyrics like 'I'm not your friend' becoming audible.)
